steps.title: Follow the full history
steps.content: The text traces the Nuyorican Poets Cafe from Medina's 1973 apartment gatherings to a rented cafe, a permanent location, expanded programming, and its ongoing role fostering emerging Nuyorican talent.

steps.title: Reject narrower purposes
steps.content: A asks for Medina's motivation, which the text does not explain. B broadens to New York's cultural life as a whole. C focuses only on the expansion into art and music and asks why, but no reason is given. The answer is D.
